meta.title: About - Emmanuel Alanis
meta.description: Full-stack developer building multi-tenant SaaS products, delivery platforms, and payment systems with TypeScript, Next.js, and PostgreSQL.

title: About
subtitle: AI-First Full-Stack Developer
description: I orchestrate AI tools to ship production software at human-team speed. Real users. Real payments. Real SOFOM.

hero.title: About
hero.description: AI-first developer based in Miguel Hidalgo, CDMX. By day I lead systems development for a Mexican SOFOM. On the side I run Alanis Dev, where I ship independent SaaS and client products. Claude Code is my daily driver. Cursor, Codex, and Gemini fill specialized roles.
hero.intro: I'm Emmanuel. I lead systems development for a Mexican SOFOM — credit operations, federal payment middleware, KYC biometrics, real-time integrations. On the side I've shipped Ready Set, Vetify, Destino SF, Pagaré Fácil, and FitTrackr through Alanis Dev. Twelve years writing code, two years AI-first.
hero.focus: AI-first means the work happens differently: I review more, type less, and ship at a cadence that used to take a small team. The tools change, the standards don't — clean architecture, real tests, things that hold up in production.

section.title: What I Build
section.description: Real products, not just demos. Here's the kind of work I do.

saas.title: SaaS Platforms
saas.description: Multi-tenant architecture with subscription billing, role-based access, and tenant isolation using PostgreSQL Row Level Security.
saas.example: Vetify — Veterinary clinic management with Stripe billing, WhatsApp integration, and appointment scheduling.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce & Payments
ecommerce.description: Full checkout flows with Stripe and Square integrations, subscription management, and automated payment failure handling.
ecommerce.example: Destino SF — Specialty food e-commerce with Square payments. Pagare Facil — Promissory note generator with PDF export.

logistics.title: Enterprise Logistics
logistics.description: Real-time tracking, driver and vendor management, on-demand delivery coordination, and multi-role dashboards.
logistics.example: Ready Set — Enterprise courier delivery platform for the San Francisco Bay Area.

ai.title: AI-First Workflow
ai.description: Claude Code is the daily driver — reviews, refactors, ships. Cursor for in-editor pair programming. Codex for adversarial second opinions. Gemini for OCR and document understanding. Production output, not toy demos.
ai.example: FitTrackr uses Gemini OCR for nutrition labels. The SOFOM migration runs on Claude Code coordinating PHP-to-TypeScript microservice extraction.

quality.title: Quality Code
quality.description: I write clean, tested, and maintainable code. Every project follows best practices with proper testing and documentation.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Technology evolves fast. I stay current with modern tools, frameworks, and best practices to deliver the best solutions.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Great software is built by great teams. I value clear communication, code reviews, and knowledge sharing.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: The tools I use to build production software.

jsonLd.description: Full-stack developer building multi-tenant SaaS products, delivery platforms, and payment systems
